audience: The next team is responsible for the AAA-level VISUAL overhaul. Gameplay/systems are feature-complete; see 'forTheVisualsTeam' for exactly where art/render hooks live.

project.name: Knotz: Invade Space
project.tagline: A modern, juiced-up roguelite reimagining of Space Invaders.
project.playLoop: Pick a mode (Campaign / Endless / Daily) -> play a run -> earn credits -> spend them in the Hangar on permanent upgrades -> chase a higher score, deeper sectors, the Campaign victory, the daily leaderboard, and 14 achievements.

status.summary: Content-complete roguelite. Six build phases shipped. No known runtime errors (validated headlessly across all states + modes).

phasesCompleted.title: Modern arcade rebuild
phasesCompleted.delivered: Modular vanilla-JS engine: juice (shake/particles/hit-flash/trails/combos), Galaga dive AI, energy beam, 6 power-ups, multi-phase boss every 5th wave, endless background progression, synthesized Web Audio SFX+music, keyboard+touch, responsive canvas, localStorage hi-score, menu/pause/game-over.

phasesCompleted.title: Roguelite meta + content
phasesCompleted.delivered: Persistent profile + Hangar shop (7 upgrades), new enemies (Stinger, Splitter) + elite modifier, Combat Drone, Magnet, twin Auto-Cannons, Aegis shield, splitting asteroid hazards, credit payouts.

phasesCompleted.title: Boss & mini-boss variety
phasesCompleted.delivered: Rewrote boss.js into a DATA-DRIVEN class. BOSS_TYPES (Overlord/Weaver/Warden) rotate per encounter with distinct attack patterns (aimed/spread/ring/spiral/shotgun/curtain) + sweep styles; MINIBOSS_TYPES (Sentinel/Lancer) escort some waves with a floating health bar.

phasesCompleted.title: Settings + accessibility + difficulty
phasesCompleted.delivered: New 'settings' state (settings.js): master/music/SFX volume sliders, screen-shake toggle, reduced-motion toggle, difficulty (easy/normal/hard), touch-controls mode. Save schema v2 with forward-migration. Difficulty fans out across enemy aggression/speed, boss HP/fire, credits and start lives.

phasesCompleted.title: Achievements + Daily Challenge
phasesCompleted.delivered: achievements.js (14 unlockables, toasts, viewer) + daily.js (date-seeded run with 2 random modifiers; deterministic formations; per-day best). Mulberry32 PRNG in utils.js.

phasesCompleted.title: Game modes + Campaign victory
phasesCompleted.delivered: CONFIG.modes (campaign/endless/daily). Campaign ends in a VICTORY screen after winBosses bosses (Earth finale background). Menu rebuilt with clickable mode chips + LAUNCH + Hangar/Settings/Awards buttons.

phasesCompleted.title: Mobile on-screen controls
phasesCompleted.delivered: Rewrote input.js for multi-touch; on-screen ◀ ▶ / FIRE / BEAM buttons (UI.drawTouchControls). 'touchControls' setting: auto/on/off.

phasesCompleted.title: Economy & difficulty balance pass
phasesCompleted.delivered: Credit payout nudged up (perScore .015, perBoss 75); added CONFIG.wave.maxSpeed cap for fair deep waves. Remaining balance is data in CONFIG for playtesters.

techStack.audio: Web Audio API (all SFX + music synthesized at runtime, zero audio files)
techStack.build: NONE. No bundler, transpiler, package.json, or node_modules.
techStack.modules: Plain classic <script> tags in dependency order (NOT ES modules) so the game runs by double-clicking index.html over file:// with no server. Each file defines globals; cross-file refs resolve at call time.
techStack.runtimeForTooling: Node v24.x (only for the optional headless smoke test / screenshots; not required to play).

howToRun.play: Open index.html in any modern browser. No server or install.
howToRun.note: Audio starts on first key press / tap (autoplay policy). Everything is synthesized.
howToRun.optionalLocalServer: Only needed if you switch to ES modules or fetch(); then serve over http (npx serve / Live Server).

howToDevelop.workflow: Edit files under src/, refresh the browser. No compile step.
howToDevelop.addingAFile: Create src/yourfile.js and add a <script> to index.html at the right dependency position (see scriptLoadOrder).
howToDevelop.tuning: Balance/look knobs live in src/config.js (CONFIG). Upgrades in src/meta.js (UPGRADES). Bosses in src/boss.js (BOSS_TYPES/MINIBOSS_TYPES). Achievements in src/achievements.js (ACHIEVEMENTS). Daily modifiers in CONFIG.daily.modifiers.
howToDevelop.debugging: window.game exposes the live Game instance. window.game.openSettings('menu'), .openAchievements('menu'), .newGame('daily') etc. are handy.
howToDevelop.verification: node --check src/*.js for syntax. For runtime, reuse the Node-VM smoke technique (see verification section) — it mocks the browser, concatenates all src except main.js, and drives every state/mode/boss.

architecture.entryPoint: src/main.js -> boot() on DOMContentLoaded: preloads assets, sizes canvas, runs the fixed-timestep loop.
architecture.gameLoop: Fixed-timestep sim. game.update(dt) always called with dt = CONFIG.STEP_MS (1000/60). Motion multiplies by k = dt/STEP_MS. Render decoupled per animation frame. Spiral-of-death guard caps catch-up at 5 steps.
architecture.stateMachine: game.state in: 'menu', 'hangar', 'settings', 'achievements', 'playing', 'paused', 'gameover'. Transitions centralized in Game.handleInput(); Game.draw()/update() branch on state. Overlay states ('settings','achievements') remember their opener via settingsReturn / achReturn.
architecture.gameModes: game.mode in 'campaign' | 'endless' | 'daily'. Set by newGame(mode) from the menu. Daily resolves game.dailyMods (a run-modifier aggregate) + game.dailyKey; helpers Game.aggroMul/playerDamageMul/bossEvery/waveRng read it. Campaign ends in victory after CONFIG.campaign.winBosses bosses.
architecture.entityManagement: Pools for bullets (player+drone share game.bullets), enemyBullets, powerups, particles. Enemies in Wave.enemies; asteroids in game.asteroids; drones in game.drones; one boss/mini-boss at a time in game.boss.
architecture.coordinateConventions: Most entities use TOP-LEFT x/y + width/height (so Utils.aabb works). Gotchas: (1) Game.spawnBullet/spawnEnemyBullet take a CENTER and convert to top-left. (2) Asteroid stores a center but exposes a tightened x/y/w/h AABB. (3) Enemies store slotX/slotY; absolute pos = wave.x/y + slot. (4) Boss stores top-left x/y; width/height already include its scale.
architecture.renderOrder: Game.drawWorld(): starfield -> powerups -> enemy bullets -> asteroids -> wave enemies -> boss -> player bullets -> beam -> drones -> player -> particles. Then (outside the screen-shake translate): HUD + touch overlay + banner + pause/gameover overlays, and finally Ach.drawToasts() on top in EVERY state.

src/config.js.role: All tunables: resolution, timestep, player/bullet/enemy/wave/boss stats, hazards, drone, credits, palette (CONFIG.colors), background list, sprite-sheet frame layouts, AND newer blocks: settings defaults, difficulty presets, modes, campaign, daily.modifiers, touch button layout, saveVersion, storageKey.

src/utils.js.role: Math (clamp/lerp/rand/randInt/pick/chance/dist), Utils.aabb, easing, commas, Utils.text + Utils.roundRect canvas helpers, and Utils.makeRng (mulberry32) + Utils.hashStr (seed the Daily).

src/audio.js.role: Synthesized SFX + procedural music. setMuted + setVolumes({master,music,sfx}) layered over base bus levels via _applyVolumes(); safe to call before init().

src/input.js.role: Unified keyboard + MULTI-touch + mouse. touches Map; high-level intents left/right/fire/beam (keys + on-screen buttons); buttonRect/_touchOn/buttonsActive for the touch overlay; wasPressed/consumePressed for menus. Maps client coords to the 720x960 design space.

src/particles.js.role: Pooled particles (explosions/sparks/muzzle/thruster) + floating score popups. Reduced-motion thins counts via _count() and skips thruster; bullet trails handled in projectile.js.

src/starfield.js.role: Parallax background: the sector's space image (drifting/looping) + 3 scrolling star layers. setBackground(index).

src/projectile.js.role: Pooled glowing bullets (friendly flag distinguishes player vs enemy; reduced-motion skips trails). Beam = continuous energy column doing DPS.

src/powerup.js.role: Falling collectibles: rapid, spread, shield, energy, bomb, life.

src/meta.js.role: ROGUELITE CORE + persistence. Save schema v2 with forward-migration: { version, hi, credits, upgrades, muted, settings, achievements, daily }. Upgrade catalog; derived run modifiers; settings getters (shakeEnabled/reducedMotion/difficulty/diffMods); achievements (isUnlocked/unlockAch); daily best (dailyBest/setDailyBest). award(score,waves,bosses,extraMul).

src/achievements.js.role: 14 unlockables. Semantic hooks (onKill/onCombo/onWave/onBossKill/onScore/onCredits/onUpgrade/onVictory/onDailyComplete) decide unlocks; 'apex' rolls up after the 3 boss kills. drawToasts() (slide-in cards, any state) + drawScreen() (the 'achievements' viewer).

src/daily.js.role: Date-seeded run. todayKey() identity; modifiersFor(key) picks CONFIG.daily.pickCount distinct modifiers deterministically; aggregate() merges patches onto neutral(); waveSeed(key,n) seeds per-wave composition; today() cached snapshot; best(key).

src/player.js.role: Ship: movement+banking, primary fire (single/twin/spread/rapid), energy/beam, shield, lives, i-frames, applyPowerUp(). reset() reads Meta upgrades + difficulty + daily startLives; shoot() applies game.playerDamageMul(); takeHit() clears game.bossHitless (for the Untouchable achievement).

src/enemy.js.role: Formation/dive/return/dying states + Galaga dive AI. makeElite() promotes any enemy. Splitter bursts into diving minions via game.queueMinion().

src/boss.js.role: DATA-DRIVEN bosses. Each def: name/frameY/color/move(sine|figure8|lumber)/scale/hpMul/scoreMul/fireBase/fireMin/phases. runStep() turns an attack-step {type:aimed|spread|ring|spiral|shotgun|curtain} into bullets. Full bosses rotate by tier; mini-bosses (opts.mini) are smaller, drop loot, don't clear the sector. Difficulty scales HP + fire cadence. drawHealthBar (top bar) / drawMiniBar (floating).

src/wave.js.role: Formation marcher. constructor(...,rng): composition RNG is seeded for the Daily. create() rolls enemy types/elites (+ daily eliteChanceAdd). Aggression = Meta.diffMods().enemyFireMul * game.aggroMul(). Detects invasion (loss).

src/drone.js.role: Auto-firing wingman from the Combat Drone upgrade; fires from the shared bullet pool.

src/hazard.js.role: Rotating asteroid that falls, shatters big->med->small. Daily can raise spawn rate + big chance.

src/ui.js.role: ALL on-screen UI: HUD (drawHUD), the rebuilt menu (drawMenu, builds UI.menuRects clickable hit-rects + mode chips + buttons), pause (drawPause), game-over/victory (drawGameOver), wave/boss banners (drawBanner), and the touch overlay (drawTouchControls). Pure drawing — Game owns state.

src/hangar.js.role: Between-runs upgrade shop ('hangar' state). Keyboard + mouse/touch. Fires Ach.onUpgrade() on a successful buy.

src/settings.js.role: The 'settings' state. Volume sliders + shake/reduced-motion toggles + difficulty/touch-controls cycles. Keyboard (arrows/Enter) and click/drag (rebuilds hit-rects each draw). Persists via Meta.setSetting (-> save + applySettings).

src/game.js.role: ORCHESTRATOR. State machine, modes (newGame(mode), dailyMods, campaign victory), all pools, collisions, scoring/combos, wave+boss progression + mini-boss escorts, hazards, drones, magnet, screen shake (gated by Meta.shakeEnabled), banners, achievement hooks, and meta/credits.

src/main.js.exports: Assets (global), loadAssets(), boot(), the rAF loop
src/main.js.role: Asset preloader + loading screen, responsive canvas sizing, fixed-timestep loop.

forTheVisualsTeam.mission: Replace/augment the programmer-art rendering with AAA visuals WITHOUT changing gameplay timing or the file:// no-build constraint. Most draw code is isolated in *.draw(c) methods using a single Canvas 2D context.
forTheVisualsTeam.noBuildConstraint: Keep classic <script> tags (no ES modules / no fetch) so index.html still runs by double-click. If you need a build pipeline or asset loading via fetch, you must add a static server and update howToRun + main.js loadAssets.

whereRenderingLives.perEntity: Each entity owns a draw(c): Player.draw, Enemy.draw, Boss.draw, Bullet.draw + Beam.draw (projectile.js), PowerUp.draw, Asteroid.draw (hazard.js), Drone.draw, Particle/Popup.draw (particles.js), Starfield.draw.
whereRenderingLives.uiAndScreens: src/ui.js (HUD/menu/pause/gameover/banner/touch overlay), src/hangar.js (shop), src/settings.js (settings), src/achievements.js (toasts + viewer).
whereRenderingLives.compositing: Game.draw() applies the screen-shake translate around drawWorld only; HUD/overlays/toasts draw in screen space after. Many effects use ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'lighter' for additive glow.

spriteSheets.beetlemorph.png: 240x320, 3 cols x 4 rows of 80x80 (cols 0/1 idle flap; 4 colour rows). Stinger pins frameY=1.
spriteSheets.rhinomorph.png: 480x320, 6 cols x 4 rows of 80x80 (cols 0-3 damage frames; 4 colour rows). Splitter pins frameY=2.
spriteSheets.boss.png: 2200x800, 11 cols x 4 rows of 200x200 (frameX 0/1 idle; frameY = archetype/tier colour). Boss archetypes use frameY 0/1/2; mini-bosses use frameY 3.

artAssets.backgrounds: 10 space backdrops in assets/ (background*.png + backgroundEarth.png), cycled per sector via Starfield.setBackground(level-1). backgroundEarth is index 8 = the Campaign finale (CONFIG.campaign.finaleBackground).
artAssets.palette: CONFIG.colors is the single source of truth for entity/UI hues. Bosses get distinct bullet colours via their def.color (Overlord=boss orange, Weaver=rhino purple, Warden=danger red).
artAssets.fonts: Orbitron (Google Fonts, non-render-blocking) with a system fallback. All text goes through Utils.text (drop-shadow + optional glow).

suggestedVisualUpgrades: Higher-res sprite sheets / animated frames for player, enemies, bosses (keep the frame layout in CONFIG.sprites, or extend it).
Replace procedural Asteroid drawing (hazard.js) with sprites if desired.
Richer particle textures / additive bloom; reduced-motion already thins counts (respect Meta.reducedMotion()).
Boss attack telegraphs / unique muzzle FX per attack 'type' in Boss.runStep.
Parallax depth, nebula layers, and a proper finale set-piece over Earth on Campaign victory.
Polished mode chips / buttons / toasts; the layout + hit-rects already exist in ui.js + achievements.js.
On-screen touch buttons (UI.drawTouchControls) are functional placeholders — restyle freely; geometry is CONFIG.touch and must stay in sync with Input.buttonRect.
doNotBreak: Coordinate conventions (top-left AABB) and the center-based spawnBullet API.
Deterministic Daily: don't route Wave composition through unseeded randomness (it uses wave.rng / game.waveRng()).
The fixed-timestep contract: render may change freely, but update(dt) timing must not.

metaProgression.credits: Earned at run end: floor((score*0.015 + waves*8 + bosses*75) * difficulty.creditMul * dailyMul) (CONFIG.credits + Meta.award).
metaProgression.upgrades: 7 upgrades in UPGRADES (meta.js): hull, engine, beam, cannon (twin at Lv2), magnet, drone, aegis. Applied at Player.reset()/Game.newGame() via Meta derived getters.
metaProgression.persistence: localStorage key 'knotz_invade_space_save_v1'. Schema v2: { version, hi, credits, upgrades, muted, settings, achievements, daily }. Meta.load() forward-migrates older saves (missing fields filled from CONFIG defaults) — never wipes credits/upgrades.

keySystems.gameModes: CONFIG.modes. CAMPAIGN ends in VICTORY after CONFIG.campaign.winBosses bosses (Earth finale bg, g.victory flag drives the screen). ENDLESS = unbounded. DAILY = date-seeded run with 2 random CONFIG.daily.modifiers; deterministic formations (Utils.makeRng + Daily.waveSeed); per-day best in Meta (shown on the menu).
keySystems.difficulty: CONFIG.difficulty[easy|normal|hard] multipliers read via Meta.diffMods(): enemyFireMul, enemySpeedMul, bossHpMul, bossFireMul, creditMul, lifeBonus. Chosen in Settings.
keySystems.bosses: Data-driven (boss.js). 3 archetypes rotate by tier on boss waves; mini-bosses escort some normal waves. Attack 'steps' compose patterns; phases driven by remaining HP.
keySystems.achievements: 14 in ACHIEVEMENTS (achievements.js). Ach.* hooks fire from game.js/hangar.js; toasts slide in (Ach.drawToasts) in any state; viewer is the 'achievements' state.
keySystems.settings: settings.js / 'settings' state. Volume (master/music/sfx) -> Sound.setVolumes; screen shake + reduced motion (accessibility); difficulty; touch controls. All persist instantly.
keySystems.input: input.js multi-touch. On-screen buttons live when Input.buttonsActive() (setting auto/on/off + device touch). CONFIG.touch is the shared layout for Input.buttonRect + UI.drawTouchControls.
keySystems.deferredMinionSpawn: Splitter death enqueues minions via game.queueMinion(); flushed in Game._flushMinions() AFTER collision resolution. Follow this for any mid-frame entity spawn.
keySystems.screenShake: game.shake(mag, durMs) — no-op when Meta.shakeEnabled() is false. Applied as a translate around drawWorld only.
keySystems.audio: Sound singleton. Named SFX + startMusic(tempo)/stopMusic(). Volumes via setVolumes()/_applyVolumes().

controls.move: Arrow Left/Right or A/D, on-screen ◀ ▶, or (when touch buttons are off) drag
controls.fire: Space, on-screen FIRE, or (buttons off) tap & hold
controls.beam: Shift or X, or on-screen BEAM
controls.menu: Left/Right select mode · Enter/Tap or click LAUNCH to start · H Hangar · O Settings · A Awards (all buttons are clickable)
controls.settings: Arrows select, Left/Right adjust, Enter toggle, click/drag sliders, Q/Esc back
controls.gameover: Enter/Tap retry · H hangar · O settings · A awards · Q menu

verification.philosophy: No automated suite is checked in (scratch harnesses kept out of the repo). Two reproducible techniques were used heavily this build:
verification.smokeTest: Node VM harness: mocks the browser (Proxy 2D ctx, fake Image/localStorage/window, stub Assets), concatenates all src/*.js EXCEPT main.js into one VM context, then drives game.update/draw across every state AND mode. This build validated: all 3 bosses + 2 mini-bosses to death, daily modifier + wave-composition determinism, campaign victory + Champion, achievement unlocks incl. apex/flawless rollups, menu mode-chip clicks + LAUNCH, the achievements viewer, daily-best recording, multi-touch button intents, and v1->v2 save migration.
verification.visualScreenshots: Headless Edge via the DevTools Protocol from Node (global fetch + WebSocket). Launch msedge --headless=new --remote-debugging-port=PORT --remote-allow-origins=* --user-data-dir=<unique>, poll /json/list for the page target, Runtime.evaluate to force a state (e.g. window.game.openAchievements / newGame('daily') / spawn a Boss), then Page.captureScreenshot. window.game is the live instance.
gotchas: Edge --screenshot=PATH silently fails if PATH has a space; capture via CDP or write to C:/Temp/...
Give each concurrent Edge launch a unique --user-data-dir + port and kill lingering msedge.exe between runs.

In the VM harness, expose `canvas` on the sandbox and build the Assets stub AFTER CONFIG exists; loop conditions that re-read game.boss can race with a boss dying inside update() — re-check before dereferencing.

knownIssuesAndGotchas: Single active wave at a time (game.waves holds 0 or 1). A mini-boss shares the single game.boss slot and blocks sector-clear until killed.
ES modules intentionally avoided. Introducing import/export or fetch() breaks the file:// double-click workflow (serve over http instead).

Daily determinism covers WAVE COMPOSITION + modifiers; power-up drop types and particles still use Math.random (cosmetic / fair-enough). If you want fully deterministic dailies, route those through game.waveRng-style seeded streams too.
Orbitron font loads non-render-blocking; layout assumes the system fallback is acceptable offline.
Mouse does not actuate the on-screen touch buttons unless touchControls='on' (they're driven by the touches map; mouse is added to it on press). 'auto' hides them on non-touch devices.
Balance is improved but still first-pass beyond difficulty modes; tune CONFIG.credits / UPGRADES / CONFIG.wave / CONFIG.difficulty against real playtests.
Achievement toasts draw in every state and can briefly overlap a busy screen if many unlock at once.

roadmap.primaryNext: AAA VISUAL OVERHAUL — see forTheVisualsTeam. Gameplay systems are complete; this is the headline remaining pillar.

secondarySuggestions.why: Daily best is local-only; a backend would make the seeded mode competitive.
The data-driven system makes this cheap.

secondarySuggestions.item: More achievements + cosmetic unlocks tied to credits

secondarySuggestions.why: Builds on the accessibility settings already in place.
Numbers are reasonable but unvalidated at scale.

quickStartForNewDev: 1. Open index.html in a browser — it just runs (no install).
2. Read README.md (player overview), then this handoff. If you're on visuals, read forTheVisualsTeam first.
3. Skim src/config.js (all knobs) and src/game.js (orchestrator); they anchor everything. For rendering, every entity's draw(c) + src/ui.js are your map.
4. window.game in the console drives the live game (openSettings/openAchievements/newGame('daily')/spawn a Boss).
5. Sanity-check edits with node --check src/*.js; for deeper checks reuse the Node-VM smoke technique under 'verification'.
6. Keep the no-build (classic <script>, file://) and fixed-timestep contracts intact.
